meaning: adv.蜿怜峅諠大慍,豺ｷ荵ｱ蝨ｰ,諷御ｹｱ蝨ｰ
examples: Heidi ran to meet him, confusedly telling him of the great event.
He sat up, pushing the body from him, and gazed at it, and then around him, confusedly.
I think that people were more confusedly.
Apple became one of the biggest names in gaming almost by accident, and for years it quietly and somewhat confusedly occupied this new position.
